name: Nutty Applesauce Bread (Yields 1 Loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer at medium to high speed.
3. Beat in the egg, then stir in the applesauce with a spoon.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture with a spoon, then fold in the nuts.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pan on a rack. Loosen from the sides and remove from the pan. Cool completely on a rack.
One Loaf
